common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

qualityCheck.title: Face Quality Check
qualityCheck.tooBlurry: Image is too blurry. Please hold still.
qualityCheck.tooDark: Lighting is too dark. Move to a brighter area.
qualityCheck.tooBright: Too much glare. Avoid direct sunlight.
qualityCheck.faceNotDetected: No face detected. Position your face in the frame.
qualityCheck.tooSmall: Move closer so your face fills the frame.
qualityCheck.multipleFaces: Only one person should be in the frame.
qualityCheck.occluded: Part of your face is covered. Remove obstruction if possible.

liveness.title: Liveness Check
liveness.instructionTurnLeft: Turn your head to the left.
liveness.instructionTurnRight: Turn your head to the right.
liveness.timeout: Check timed out. Please try again.

supervisorConfirmation.title: Confirm Worker Identity
supervisorConfirmation.instruction: Verify the person in front of you matches the photo.

registration.title: Register New Worker
registration.name: Full Name
registration.successQueued: Registration queued. Will sync when connected.

camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission is required for face authentication.
camera.noDevice: No front camera found on this device.

enrollment.title: Central Worker Enrollment
enrollment.thumbnailInstruction: Confirm the reference photo shown to supervisors during attendance.
enrollment.submitSuccess: Worker registered. Embedding will be generated on the server.
